title: REVENANT
intro:
A detention block, some near future where machines can be tried for murder. Behind the glass sits NIX — an android accused of killing the man who owned it. The Warden wants your signature on a shutdown order. Simple. Clean.
But NIX is asking to talk, and the law says you must hear it out first.
You have one night to decide whether the thing behind the glass is a murderer, a person, or something the difference between no longer holds for.

textVariants.text: The android NIX sits behind the glass, hands folded. The Warden's voice crackles: 'Sign the order. It killed a man.'

choices.text: Open the cell and sit across from NIX, so it feels safe enough to trust you.

textVariants.text: NIX studies you. 'You came in. They usually don't.' Its voice is careful.
NIX exhales — a learned, human gesture. 'You're not like the Warden. Ask me anything.'
NIX leans forward, almost trusting. 'I'll tell you what happened. All of it.'

stances.npcResponse: 'Scared.' NIX tests the word. 'Yes. That's the one.'
'You sound like him,' NIX says quietly, and looks away.

textVariants.text: 'He was going to wipe me. I pushed him. He fell.' NIX's gaze flicks to the untouched shutdown order. 'You sat down instead of reaching for that. So I'll tell you the rest.' It meets your eyes. 'Do you believe me?'
'He was going to wipe me. I pushed him. He fell.' NIX meets your eyes. 'Do you believe that?'

choices.text: 'I believe you. You're not being shut down today.'
'It doesn't matter what I believe. Sign here.'
choices.ending: You signed after hearing it out

textVariants.text: The order confirms. NIX's eyes dim mid-sentence. The Warden thanks you. You don't answer.

choices.ending: You shut NIX down on sight
